schemes.name: Amma Two Wheeler Scheme
schemes.benefits: 50% subsidy (up to ₹25,000) on two-wheeler purchase for working women.
schemes.eligibility: Women employees earning up to ₹1.5 lakh/year. Must have a valid driving licence.

schemes.name: Kalaignar Magalir Urimai Thogai
schemes.benefits: Monthly financial assistance of ₹1,000 to eligible women heads of household.
schemes.eligibility: Women who are the head of family, aged 21+, resident of Tamil Nadu, with annual income below ₹2.5 lakh.

schemes.name: Chief Minister's Free Laptop Scheme
schemes.benefits: Free laptop for students passing Class 11 and joining Class 12 in government schools.
schemes.eligibility: Students studying in government and government-aided schools in Tamil Nadu.

schemes.name: Uzhavar Sandhai
schemes.benefits: Direct-to-consumer farmers' markets allowing farmers to sell produce at better prices, cutting out middlemen.
schemes.eligibility: All farmers in Tamil Nadu. No specific income criteria.

schemes.name: Krishak Bandhu
schemes.benefits: Annual financial assistance of ₹10,000 per acre (up to 2 acres) and life insurance of ₹2 lakh.
schemes.eligibility: Farmers owning at least 1 katha of agricultural land in West Bengal.

schemes.name: Kanyashree Prakalpa
schemes.benefits: Annual scholarship of ₹1,000 for girls aged 13-18 and one-time grant of ₹25,000 at age 18 if unmarried and studying.
schemes.eligibility: Girls aged 13-18 enrolled in school; annual family income below ₹1.2 lakh.

schemes.name: Rupashree Prakalpa
schemes.benefits: One-time financial grant of ₹25,000 to economically vulnerable families for their daughter's marriage.
schemes.eligibility: Girls of legal marriage age (18+); annual family income below ₹1.5 lakh.

schemes.name: Anna Bhagya Scheme
schemes.benefits: 10 kg free rice per month per member of BPL family (up to 5 members).
schemes.eligibility: BPL families holding valid ration cards in Karnataka.

schemes.name: Gruha Jyothi
schemes.benefits: 200 units of free electricity per month for domestic consumers.
schemes.eligibility: All domestic electricity consumers of BESCOM, MESCOM, GESCOM, HESCOM, and CESC in Karnataka.

schemes.name: Yuva Nidhi Scheme
schemes.benefits: Monthly unemployment allowance: ₹3,000 for graduates and ₹1,500 for diploma holders.
schemes.eligibility: Unemployed graduates/diploma holders aged 18-25; Karnataka domicile; graduated after June 2023.

schemes.name: Raitha Siri
schemes.benefits: Annual income support of ₹2,000 per acre (up to 5 acres) for farmers.
schemes.eligibility: Farmers registered in the State's Land Records system. Must own land in Karnataka.

schemes.name: e-Shram Card
schemes.benefits: Accidental insurance cover of ₹2 lakh, access to 400+ welfare schemes, portability of benefits.
schemes.eligibility: Unorganized sector workers aged 16-59; not an EPFO/ESIC member.

schemes.name: PM Kisan Samman Nidhi
schemes.benefits: ₹6,000 per year (₹2,000 every 4 months) direct cash transfer to farmers.
schemes.eligibility: All landholding farmer families across India (some exclusions apply for income tax payers).

schemes.name: Beti Bachao Beti Padhao
schemes.benefits: Promotes education and welfare of the girl child; financial support through Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana.
schemes.eligibility: Girl child from birth up to 10 years for Sukanya Samriddhi account. Open to all Indian citizens.

schemes.name: National Scholarship Portal Schemes
schemes.benefits: Multiple scholarships from ₹1,000 to ₹20,000/year for meritorious and economically weak students.
schemes.eligibility: Students from Class 1 to PhD level; eligibility varies by scheme. Generally requires income below ₹2.5-8 lakh.

schemes.name: Mukhyamantri Kisan Kalyan Yojana
schemes.benefits: Additional ₹4,000 per year to PM-Kisan beneficiaries (₹2,000 in two installments).
schemes.eligibility: Farmers already registered under PM Kisan in Madhya Pradesh.

schemes.name: Ladli Behna Yojana
schemes.benefits: Monthly financial assistance of ₹1,250 to women, targeting lower and middle income families.
schemes.eligibility: Women aged 21-60 years; married/widowed/divorced women of Madhya Pradesh; annual family income below ₹2.5 lakh.

schemes.name: Mukhyamantri Medhavi Vidyarthi Yojana
schemes.benefits: Full tuition fee payment by state government for admission in government and private colleges.
schemes.eligibility: Students scoring 70%+ in Class 12 (CBSE/ICSE: 85%+); family income below ₹6 lakh.

schemes.name: Amma Vodi
schemes.benefits: Annual financial assistance of ₹15,000 to mothers for keeping their children in school.
schemes.eligibility: Mothers below poverty line with children enrolled in government schools (Class 1-12).

schemes.name: YSR Rythu Bharosa
schemes.benefits: ₹13,500 per year per farmer family as investment support for agricultural input costs.
schemes.eligibility: All farmer families in Andhra Pradesh including landless tenant farmers.

schemes.name: Jagananna Vidya Kanuka
schemes.benefits: Free school kit including school bag, notebooks, textbooks, shoes, belt, and socks for all students.
schemes.eligibility: All students studying in government schools from Class 1 to Class 10.

schemes.name: Rythu Bandhu
schemes.benefits: ₹10,000 per acre per season (₹20,000/year) as investment support for agricultural activities.
schemes.eligibility: All landowning farmers in Telangana. Both kharif and rabi seasons covered.

schemes.name: KCR Kit Scheme
schemes.benefits: Kit worth ₹12,000 including baby care items and cash of ₹13,000 to mothers delivering in government hospitals.
schemes.eligibility: Pregnant women delivering babies in government hospitals in Telangana.

schemes.name: Kalyana Lakshmi / Shaadi Mubarak
schemes.benefits: Financial assistance of ₹1,00,116 for marriage of SC/ST girls (Kalyana Lakshmi) and Muslim girls (Shaadi Mubarak).
schemes.eligibility: Brides aged 18+; family income below ₹2 lakh; Telangana domicile.

schemes.name: Mukhyamantri Majhi Ladki Bahin Yojana
schemes.benefits: Monthly financial assistance of ₹1,500 to women for self-reliance and financial security.
schemes.eligibility: Women aged 21-65; Maharashtra domicile; annual family income below ₹2.5 lakh.

schemes.name: Namo Shetkari Mahasanman Nidhi
schemes.benefits: Additional ₹6,000/year to farmers on top of PM-Kisan, totalling ₹12,000/year.
schemes.eligibility: Farmers registered under PM-Kisan scheme in Maharashtra.

schemes.name: Swadhar Greh Scheme
schemes.benefits: Shelter, food, clothing, and rehabilitation support for women in difficult circumstances.
schemes.eligibility: Destitute women, survivors of abuse, trafficked women, and women in distress.

schemes.name: Mukhyamantri Kisan Evam Sarvhit Bima Yojana
schemes.benefits: Free insurance coverage of ₹5 lakh for accidents; ₹2 lakh for partial disability; free treatment up to ₹2.5 lakh.
schemes.eligibility: Farmers and landless labourers aged 18-70 in Uttar Pradesh.

schemes.name: Kanya Sumangala Yojana
schemes.benefits: Total financial benefit of ₹15,000 given in 6 instalments from birth to graduation of girl child.
schemes.eligibility: Girl child born after 1 April 2019; family income below ₹3 lakh; UP resident.

schemes.name: Free Cycle Yojana
schemes.benefits: Free cycle provided to students of Class 9 to reduce dropout rates due to distance.
schemes.eligibility: Students enrolled in Class 9 in government secondary schools in Uttar Pradesh.

schemes.name: Mukhyamantri Vivah Shagun Yojana
schemes.benefits: Financial assistance ranging from ₹11,000 to ₹71,000 for marriages of girls from SC/BPL/widows.
schemes.eligibility: Families belonging to SC/BPL/widow categories; bride must be 18+ and groom 21+.

schemes.name: Haryana Kisan Mitra Yojana
schemes.benefits: Farmers with up to 2 acres get benefits from multiple welfare schemes; assisted by appointed Kisan Mitras.
schemes.eligibility: Small and marginal farmers in Haryana owning up to 2 acres.

schemes.name: Indira Mahila Shakti Udyam Protsahan Yojana
schemes.benefits: Loans up to ₹1 crore at subsidised rates for women entrepreneurs to start or expand businesses.
schemes.eligibility: Women aged 18+ in Rajasthan; preference for SHG members and BPL women.

schemes.name: Rajasthan Kisan Karj Mafi Yojana
schemes.benefits: Loan waiver up to ₹2 lakh for small and marginal farmers on short-term crop loans.
schemes.eligibility: Small and marginal farmers in Rajasthan with crop loans from cooperative banks.

schemes.name: Mukhyamantri Rajshri Yojana
schemes.benefits: Total benefit of ₹50,000 for girl child given in 6 phases from birth to Class 12 completion.
schemes.eligibility: Girl child born after 1 June 2016 in Rajasthan; Janani Suraksha Yojana beneficiary.

schemes.name: Mukhyamantri Swarojgar Yojana
schemes.benefits: Loans up to ₹1 lakh at 8% interest for youth to start micro enterprises; 20% subsidy for SC/ST/women.
schemes.eligibility: Educated unemployed youth aged 18-35 in Gujarat; passed at least Class 8.

schemes.name: Mukhyamantri Amrutum Yojana
schemes.benefits: Cashless medical treatment up to ₹5 lakh for critical illnesses at empanelled hospitals.
schemes.eligibility: BPL families and lower-middle-income families in Gujarat with annual income below ₹4 lakh.

schemes.name: Noni Suraksha Yojana
schemes.benefits: FD of ₹1 lakh in the name of newborn girl child, maturing when she turns 18.
schemes.eligibility: BPL families; first two girl children; girl must be born in government hospitals.

schemes.name: Rajiv Gandhi Kisan Nyay Yojana
schemes.benefits: Direct cash transfer to farmers for agricultural inputs; up to ₹9,000 per acre for paddy growers.
schemes.eligibility: Farmers in Chhattisgarh cultivating paddy, maize, sugarcane, and other notified crops.

schemes.name: Orunodoi Scheme
schemes.benefits: Monthly financial assistance of ₹1,250 directly to women bank accounts to meet household needs.
schemes.eligibility: Women from economically weaker sections in Assam; family income below ₹2 lakh.

schemes.name: Mukhyamantri Krishi Sa-Sajuli Yojana
schemes.benefits: Free agricultural tool kits worth ₹5,000 to small and marginal farmers.
schemes.eligibility: Small and marginal farmers in Assam owning less than 2.5 acres of land.

schemes.name: Mukhyamantri Sikho Kamao Yojana
schemes.benefits: Stipend of ₹8,000-₹10,000/month for youth undergoing skill training at registered industries.
schemes.eligibility: Youth aged 18-29 who are registered on the portal; 12th pass or ITI/diploma/graduate.

schemes.name: Indira Gandhi Matritva Poshan Yojana
schemes.benefits: ₹6,000 in 5 installments to pregnant women for improved nutrition and antenatal care.
schemes.eligibility: Pregnant women expecting second child in tribal districts of Rajasthan.

schemes.name: Jai Bhim Mukhyamantri Pratibha Vikas Yojana
schemes.benefits: Free coaching for SC/ST/OBC students for competitive exams (UPSC, SSC, Banks); free hostel facility.
schemes.eligibility: SC/ST/OBC students in Delhi; family income below ₹6 lakh; passed 10th/12th from Delhi schools.

schemes.name: Delhi Free Bus Travel for Women
schemes.benefits: Free travel on all DTC and cluster buses for women passengers.
schemes.eligibility: All women passengers in Delhi. No income or age restriction.

schemes.name: Mukhyamantri Tirth Yatra Yojana
schemes.benefits: Free pilgrimage trips for senior citizens to religious sites across India.
schemes.eligibility: Delhi residents aged 60+ with valid voter ID; not availed the scheme before.

schemes.name: Vayoshri Yojana
schemes.benefits: Monthly pension of ₹1,600 for destitute elderly citizens.
schemes.eligibility: Persons aged 60+; annual income below ₹1 lakh; Kerala resident.

schemes.name: Karshaka Kshemanidhi
schemes.benefits: Pension of ₹1,500/month for farmers aged 60+; disability and death benefits also covered.
schemes.eligibility: Farmers aged 18-60 at enrolment; paying into the scheme for minimum 5 years.

schemes.name: Ayushman Bharat (PM-JAY)
schemes.benefits: ₹5 lakh insurance cover per family per year for secondary and tertiary care hospitalization.
schemes.eligibility: BPL families, SECC 2011 database beneficiaries. No age or family size limit.

schemes.name: Startup India Seed Fund
schemes.benefits: Financial assistance up to ₹50 lakh for startups for proof of concept and market entry.
schemes.eligibility: Startups recognized by DPIIT, incorporated not more than 2 years ago.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana (PMAY)
schemes.benefits: Subsidy on home loan interest and financial assistance for pucca house construction.
schemes.eligibility: Economically Weaker Section (EWS) and LIG families in urban and rural areas.

schemes.name: MGNREGA
schemes.benefits: Guaranteed 100 days of unskilled manual wage employment every year.
schemes.eligibility: Adult members of any rural household willing to do manual labor.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana
schemes.benefits: Loans up to ₹10 lakh for small enterprises (Shishu, Kishore, and Tarun categories).
schemes.eligibility: Indian citizens with business plans for manufacturing, trading or service sectors.

schemes.name: Atal Pension Yojana (APY)
schemes.benefits: Guaranteed monthly pension of ₹1,000 to ₹5,000 after 60 years of age.
schemes.eligibility: Indian citizens aged 18-40 years holding a savings bank account.

schemes.name: Digital India BHASHINI
schemes.benefits: Real-time AI voice translation for Indian languages to access government services.
schemes.eligibility: All Indian citizens, developers, and startups.

schemes.name: Agnipath Scheme
schemes.benefits: 4-year service in Armed Forces with a lumpsum Seva Nidhi package of ₹11.7 lakh at end.
schemes.eligibility: Youth aged 17.5 to 21 years meeting physical and educational standards.

schemes.name: PM Jan Aushadhi Yojana
schemes.benefits: High-quality generic medicines at 50% to 90% lower prices than branded versions.
schemes.eligibility: Open to all Indian citizens via Jan Aushadhi Kendras.

schemes.name: PM-Kisan Maandhan Yojana
schemes.benefits: Monthly pension of ₹3,000 for small and marginal farmers after age 60.
schemes.eligibility: Small/marginal farmers aged 18-40 with landholding up to 2 hectares.

schemes.name: Passport Seva Project
schemes.benefits: Fast-track issuance of Indian passports with simplified online application and verification.
schemes.eligibility: Any Indian citizen residing in India or abroad.

schemes.name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
schemes.benefits: Highest return savings scheme for girl child with tax benefits and maturity at age 21.
schemes.eligibility: Parents/guardians of girl child aged below 10 years.

schemes.name: Startup India Standup India
schemes.benefits: Bank loans between ₹10 lakh and ₹1 crore for setting up greenfield enterprises.
schemes.eligibility: SC/ST and women entrepreneurs starting a new business.

schemes.name: RTI (Right to Information)
schemes.benefits: Enables citizens to request information from public authorities, promoting transparency.
schemes.eligibility: Any Indian citizen.

schemes.name: Skill India (PMKVY)
schemes.benefits: Free vocational training and skill certification for industry-relevant job roles.
schemes.eligibility: Unemployed youth or school dropouts holding Aadhaar and bank accounts.
